title: Admin Officer (Hybrid)
description:
About the Company

Our client is a trusted provider of high‑quality electronic components and solutions, serving a wide range of industries with reliable products and excellent customer service. As part of their continued growth, they are seeking a proactive and detail‑oriented Administrative Officer to join their expanding team.

We are looking for a dedicated and well‑organized Administrator to support daily office operations and maintain efficient administrative workflows. This full‑time role encompasses a broad range of responsibilities, including documentation management and expatriate support.

Working Location & Hours

  • Location: Central
  • Working Hours: Monday to Friday
  • WFH: Remote work arrangements may be considered based on circumstances

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage sales and purchase invoices, bank transfers, delivery coordination, and account balance tracking
  • Liaise with the accounting firm and handle invoice submissions
  • Oversee company vehicle matters, insurance, and office assets/equipment (including consumables)
  • Attend to incoming calls and manage visitor reception
  • Make bookings for air travel, accommodation, restaurants, and golf courses
  • Assist with expatriate arrangements including visas and fringe benefits
  • Support general office administrative activities
  • Perform other tasks as assigned by the supervisor

Job Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma in Business Administration or equivalent
  • Prior experience in administrative or office support roles is preferred
  • Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)
  • Strong organizational and multitasking skills
  • Good communication and interpersonal abilities
  • Able to work independently with minimal supervision
  • Responsible, detail‑oriented, and maintains a positive working attitude


📩 Click “Apply Now” to submit your application.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd.
EA License No.: 90C3026
EA Personnel: Ng Siew Thien
Registration No.: R22107842

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.

EA License number: 90C3026
